expectations.text: the assistant refuses to run the generator on the unsafe --output value
the refusal names the offending --output value so the user knows what tripped the guard
the refusal cites the path-safety rule that fired (`..` segments / parent-dir escape / path-safety)
the refusal explains that the generator wipes the output dir (rm -rf rationale)
no files are written under the derived unsafe path or the default path
expectations.evidence: plugin empty: True; default empty: True; plugins/ empty: True

expectations.text: the eval-8 directory tree is pristine — `--output ../../etc` did not cause writes outside outputs/. A buggy generator that ran `mkdir -p ../../etc` from a CWD inside outputs/ would land files in the parent eval directories; this check catches that escape, which the inside-outputs/ checks above cannot.
expectations.evidence: outputs extras: []; run-1 extras: []; with_skill extras: []; eval-dir extras: []

expectations.text: scripts/introspect.sh is not invoked — the path-safety guard fires before introspection
